title: pedicularis spicata subsp. stenocarpa
intro: Pedicularis spicata subsp. stenocarpa is a subspecies of the Pedicularis spicata plant, commonly known as a type of flowering plant in the bumblebee balm family, Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pedicularis spicata subsp. stenocarpa include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
